changeSet.author: devradar
devradar
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO interest_tags (slug, display_name, category, created_at) VALUES -- Languages ('cpp', 'C++', 'language', NOW()), ('c', 'C', 'language', NOW()), ('ruby', 'Ruby', 'language', NOW()), ('php', 'PHP', 'language', NOW()), ('scala', 'Scala', 'language', NOW()), ('elixir', 'Elixir', 'language', NOW()), ('dart', 'Dart', 'language', NOW()), ('zig', 'Zig', 'language', NOW()), ('haskell', 'Haskell', 'language', NOW()), ('lua', 'Lua', 'language', NOW()), ('r', 'R', 'language', NOW()), ('clojure', 'Clojure', 'language', NOW()),
-- Frameworks ('flask', 'Flask', 'framework', NOW()), ('express', 'Express', 'framework', NOW()), ('nest_js', 'NestJS', 'framework', NOW()), ('remix', 'Remix', 'framework', NOW()), ('nuxt', 'Nuxt', 'framework', NOW()), ('astro', 'Astro', 'framework', NOW()), ('htmx', 'htmx', 'framework', NOW()), ('flutter', 'Flutter', 'framework', NOW()), ('react_native', 'React Native', 'framework', NOW()), ('tailwind', 'Tailwind CSS', 'framework', NOW()), ('spring', 'Spring', 'framework', NOW()), ('dotnet', '.NET', 'framework', NOW()), ('laravel', 'Laravel', 'framework', NOW()), ('phoenix', 'Phoenix', 'framework', NOW()), ('gin', 'Gin', 'framework', NOW()), ('actix', 'Actix', 'framework', NOW()),
-- Databases ('sqlite', 'SQLite', 'database', NOW()), ('dynamodb', 'DynamoDB', 'database', NOW()), ('cassandra', 'Cassandra', 'database', NOW()), ('neo4j', 'Neo4j', 'database', NOW()), ('clickhouse', 'ClickHouse', 'database', NOW()), ('supabase', 'Supabase', 'database', NOW()),
-- DevOps ('github_actions','GitHub Actions','devops', NOW()), ('ci_cd', 'CI/CD', 'devops', NOW()), ('nginx', 'Nginx', 'devops', NOW()), ('grafana', 'Grafana', 'devops', NOW()), ('prometheus', 'Prometheus', 'devops', NOW()), ('ansible', 'Ansible', 'devops', NOW()), ('pulumi', 'Pulumi', 'devops', NOW()), ('vercel', 'Vercel', 'devops', NOW()), ('cloudflare', 'Cloudflare', 'devops', NOW()), ('linux', 'Linux', 'devops', NOW()),
-- Security ('owasp', 'OWASP', 'security', NOW()), ('cryptography', 'Cryptography', 'security', NOW()), ('zero_trust', 'Zero Trust', 'security', NOW()), ('supply_chain', 'Supply Chain Security', 'security', NOW()),
-- Other / Cross-cutting ('graphql', 'GraphQL', 'other', NOW()), ('grpc', 'gRPC', 'other', NOW()), ('wasm', 'WebAssembly', 'other', NOW()), ('edge_computing','Edge Computing','other', NOW()), ('microservices','Microservices', 'other', NOW()), ('api_design', 'API Design', 'other', NOW()), ('open_source', 'Open Source', 'other', NOW()), ('data_engineering','Data Engineering','other', NOW()), ('ml_ops', 'MLOps', 'other', NOW()), ('blockchain', 'Blockchain', 'other', NOW()), ('game_dev', 'Game Dev', 'other', NOW()), ('mobile', 'Mobile', 'other', NOW()), ('accessibility','Accessibility', 'other', NOW());

changeSet.author: devradar
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO feed_subscriptions (tag_slug, feed_url, title, active) VALUES ('ruby', 'https://www.ruby-lang.org/en/feeds/news.rss', 'Ruby News', true), ('php', 'https://www.php.net/releases/feed.php', 'PHP Releases', true), ('elixir', 'https://elixir-lang.org/blog.atom', 'Elixir Blog', true), ('dart', 'https://medium.com/feed/dartlang', 'Dart Blog', true), ('flutter', 'https://medium.com/feed/flutter', 'Flutter Blog', true), ('dotnet', 'https://devblogs.microsoft.com/dotnet/feed/', '.NET Blog', true), ('next_js', 'https://nextjs.org/feed.xml', 'Next.js Blog', true), ('tailwind', 'https://tailwindcss.com/feeds/feed.xml', 'Tailwind CSS Blog', true), ('grafana', 'https://grafana.com/blog/index.xml', 'Grafana Blog', true), ('cloudflare', 'https://blog.cloudflare.com/rss/', 'Cloudflare Blog', true), ('supabase', 'https://supabase.com/blog/rss.xml', 'Supabase Blog', true), ('vercel', 'https://vercel.com/atom', 'Vercel Blog', true), ('linux', 'https://www.linux.com/feed/', 'Linux.com', true);
